feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Process Automation
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Process Automation Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: [URGENT] All My Inbox apps in SAP BTP Build Work Zone are Crashing in 2025
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

All your Build workzone My Inbox apps are crashing in Build workzone, please help.

entry.title: How can I get data from custom business object of s4hana cloud from SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi all,

I would like to get Approver email of SAP Build Process Automation workflow from custom business object data of S4hana cloud.

The steps I would like to do are,

1. Create custom business object of Approver list by using key-user (in-app) extensibility.

2. Create BPA workflow 

3. Call Approver list of custom business object from BPA workflow

 

Could you please give me advice how can I get data from custom business object from BPA workflow?

 

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

entry.title: To trigger workflow in SAP build process Automation from sapui5 form
entry.content: how can i trigger workflow in SAP build process Automation from sapui5 Form, i want to trigger the process from SAP ui5 form.

entry.title: Can't find process and workflows tile in the monitoring section
entry.content: In SAP Build Code, Under the Monitoring Section I am unable to find the tile Processes and workflow tile

entry.title: Issue getting DMS Folder Content in SAP Build Process Automation - Undefined DMS Destination
entry.content:
Hi

I am trying to get the DMS Folder Content using the SAP provided activity "get DMS Folder Content", but I keep getting this error

The file Is uploaded using File Upload in SBPA Form, so initial DMS Destination is already set. I am using this activity to get the folder content

In the folder path, I am passing the hash number which I received after uploading the file. Is this the correct value? Also what specific destination we need to use the DMS Related Activities? 

The documentation does not have any details around these. Appreciate if someone can help. 

Thanks

Sandip

entry.title: How to construct cXML for Ariba in SAP Process Automation
entry.content:
We need to post a commerce XML with the data extracted to Ariba Solutions.  Is there any elegant way to do this and has it been done before.  I used a simple string concatenation and used the string for the body and it is a pain to give escape characters.

return {
    'method' : 'POST',
    'headers': {'Accept' : '*/*',
                'Accept-Encoding' : 'gzip, deflate, br',
                'Connection': 'keep-alive',
                'Content-Type' : 'multipart/related;type="application/xml";start="<mimepart1>";boundary="----=_Part_XERRR_XDDFFDDFF"'
               },
    'url'    : url,
    'body'   : cxmlString,
    'responseType' : 'text',
    'resolveBodyOnly' :true
};

entry.title: Upload files to specific Folders inside SAP DMS from SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi

We are currently exploring to use DMS for our Process Automation Scenarios. We want to enable the end users to upload files to DMS using SBPA Forms. There are many Automation process, so we want the files to get stored inside respective project folders. 

We observed when a end user uploads a file thru SBPA Forms, a new folder is created each time. However we would like to get the files stored inside a particular folder of DMS. E.g. Sales Order Automation files will go to Sales Order Folders, Invoice will go to Invoice folder and so on. All these folders will reside under the root of the repository which we created in DMS.

Is this possible to do? So far, we have not found a way. 

Any pointers are helpfull. 

Regards

Sandip

entry.title: How to trigger workflow by creating a submit form through ui5 application
IRPA/BPA working with tables within S/4 Web/SAPUI5
entry.content:
Hello, I am bit struggling as how to define tables within S/4 public cloud. I was able to work with tables in IRPA effectively within classic SAP Gui. But this SAPUI5 is bit mystery for me. Example below:

I need something like get rows count and get rows only for filled rows, columns etc. After playing with this for whole afternoon I did not find any working way. Are there any best practices for how to work with these tables?

Thank you.

entry.title: Trigger is not created for a process containing a variant template
entry.content:
Hi community,

I'm exploring the Process Variants capability of SAP Build Process Automation. I have created a simple process as shown below and deployed it to a newly created environment (not the "public" one).

However, when I opened the form link, the form did not load. 

When I checked the environment, there was no trigger created.

If I remove the variant template step and redeploy the process, the trigger is created.

Maybe I misunderstood the process or overlooked some necessary configurations. Could someone clarify what I am missing?

entry.title: SAP IRPA can you help me recognize button?
entry.content:
Hi experts, I wonder if someone has idea what could be wrong with recognizing these buttons as collection? On captured screen, when declaring it, it seems criteria are enough like this:

But when putting this to loop, it makes for some reason 4 Iterations and presses something in the upper left part of the browser:

Any idea what may be wrong with the definition? Many thanks

entry.title: SAP Desktop Agent is not running in unattended mode
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

I have created an invoice extraction process using SAP Business Process Automation and installed SAP Desktop Agent version 3.24.X. I have also configured all necessary settings in SAP Build Process Automation Cockpit, including the environment setup and other required configurations.

The process runs as expected when tested in design mode. However, after deploying the release, I am facing the following issues:

  1. The application does not seem to execute in unattended mode in the Desktop Agent.
  2. The application is in running ... in monitor.
  3. The project is not deploying to the Desktop Agent.

I have attached screenshots of my configurations for your reference. Could you please assist in troubleshooting why the project is not deploying or executing properly in unattended mode?

entry.title: Issue with Using MAX Formula in SAP Build Apps - Only First Row Accessible
entry.content:
Hello,

I am facing an issue when trying to use the MAX formula in SAP Build Apps. I want to get the maximum value from a specific column in my data variable. However, when I try to select a column, I can only choose it from the first row (e.g., data.App1[0].Qty) instead of selecting the entire column (e.g., data.App1[].Qty).

Expected behavior:

  • The MAX function should be able to evaluate the entire list of numeric values in a column.

Observed behavior:

  • The formula editor only allows selecting a column from the first row (data.App1[0].Qty), which does not provide the expected result for the whole dataset.

Has anyone encountered this issue before? Is there a workaround or a correct way to reference an entire column in SAP Build Apps formulas?

entry.title: Issue with Losing References and Element Positions in Screen Recordings After SAP Build Automation
entry.content:
I am using SAP Build Automation, and after the latest update, I noticed that all the screen recordings have lost their references and element positions (clicks). This has significantly impacted the automation flows, as the interactions are no longer working as expected.

Could you please confirm if it is common for this to happen after an update? Is there a solution or any best practices to prevent this loss of data in future updates? I would appreciate any guidance on how to resolve or mitigate this issue with screen recordings.

Looking forward to your response.

entry.title: "SAP Build Process Automation add-ons by UiPath" versus "SAP Intelligent Robotic Process Automation"
entry.content:
SAP Build Process Automation add-ons by UiPath was released end of 2024 while SAP was already providing its own RPA solution called SAP Intelligent Robotic Process Automation.
What are the criteria to go for one or the other solution ?
Which solution SAP is now promoting ?

entry.title: How can we trigger the SBPA using UI5 Application and get the response to another UI5 Application ?
Extract the Report from SAP into Excel file
entry.content:
Hello All,

I require to interact with SAP and download the report from SAP. I am currently automating the SAP GUI to generate report from SAP by using Excel VBA Script. But, It took lot of time to complete the report extraction. 

Is there any way to get the reports from SAP without disturbing the foreground on the system ?

entry.title: Mapping issues - Actions Builder - SAP Build Automation
entry.content:
Hello ,

I'm having a flow in SAP Build Automation where I need to extract information of a pdf file by using SAP Document Information Extraction service. In SAP Build Automation I'm using the SAP GET API call for this (SAP Business Accelerator Hub). Afterwards, I need to transfer the output to SAP CPI. I'm using a post API for this where I just need to push the output as a raw body input.

I made those 2 API's in SAP Build Action Builder and defined the output schema for the GET API by using the 'generate output' option in Action Builder. For the POST API call, I used the output of the GET API to add the input schema (Fields from sample JSON).

I wanted to test this it in Action Builder and I came to the conclusion that I'm receiving this problem?

When I check my input schema I see this: 

My question now: How is it possible if I just use the output of my GET API as input in the POST API, that I says that there are mapping problems? 

Kind regards,

Cédric

entry.title: Update processing status field of standard CDS I_purchaseorderapi01 using API or EML
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

I am working on workflow development in BTP-SBPA. There is a requirement to update the status of PO (PurchaseProcessingStatus) in CDS I_purchaseOrderApi01 based on workflow result. I have tried using standard API for purchase order but status field is Read-only. Is there any another way to update the status ?

Backend system is S4HANA Public cloud. 

Thanks in advance!

ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model

entry.title: SAP BTP Process Automation Data storege
entry.content:
Greetings, 

I'm working on creating a from in SAP BTP Process Automation.

My understanding is that when capturing data from a form, it is stored as part of the process instance's context, and it is available to all subsequent steps within the same workflow. The context data persists for the lifetime of the process instance. Once the process is completed, the data will be completely gone and not accessible anymore, correct? 

If that is not true or correct, how can I fetch or trace them?
